# Stocky Fun — AI-Powered Crypto & Gold Trading Dashboard
# https://fun.stockyai.xyz

> Casino-style trading PWA with AI signals, live charts, paper trading, community chat, and gamification.

## About

Stocky Fun is a free, open-source Progressive Web App for real-time technical analysis of crypto and gold. Stocky AI generates buy/sell/hold signals from natural language prompts, combining 20+ technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, EMA, ATR) with chain-of-thought reasoning and confidence calibration.

## Supported Assets

BTC (Bitcoin), ETH (Ethereum), SOL (Solana), BNB (BNB Chain), HYPE (Hyperliquid), GOLD (Gold/XAU)

## Features

- Real-time charts via TradingView (1s/1m/5m/15m timeframes)
- AI trading signals with 5-step chain-of-thought reasoning
- Confidence breakdown: trend, momentum, volatility, structure, confluence
- Second opinion / critique endpoint (devil's advocate analysis)
- Technical analysis: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, EMA (9/21/50/200), ATR
- Paper trading simulator with PnL tracking
- Community chat with Indian tier 2 market discussion
- Gamification: XP, levels, achievements, daily quests, leaderboard
- Mobile-first swipeable UI (PWA installable on iOS/Android)

## AI API

POST https://fun.stockyai.xyz/api/analyze
Body: { "prompt": "Should I buy BTC now?", "coin": "bitcoin", "coinSymbol": "BTC" }
Returns: prediction, confidence, signal, rationale, keyLevels, action, risk, thinking, confidenceBreakdown

POST https://fun.stockyai.xyz/api/analyze/critique
Body: { "analysis": {...}, "ta": {...}, "coinSymbol": "BTC" }
Returns: flaws, overlooked, alternativeView, adjustedConfidence, verdict

## More Info

- AI signal guide: https://fun.stockyai.xyz/ai.md
- Architecture: https://fun.stockyai.xyz/architecture.md
- LLM integration: https://fun.stockyai.xyz/llm.md
- Project summary: https://fun.stockyai.xyz/summary.md
- Source code: https://github.com/SirCharan/stocky-fun
- Blog: https://www.charandeepkapoor.com/blog/stocky-ai

## Tech Stack

React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Framer Motion, Node.js, Express, Stocky AI, CoinGecko API, Binance WebSocket, TradingView, Vercel serverless.
